arguments.argument: playSound(global.snd_ZeldaToMap,0,1,11025) global.recAreaTrans+=1 global.recZeldaEnc+=1 global.newMapX=x if room=rLink2_Overworld global.newMapY=y else global.newMapY=y+10000 var tTileID,tTileLeft; tTileID=tile_layer_find(1000000,x,y) tTileLeft=tile_get_left(tTileID) transition_steps=5 transition_kind=20 if tTileLeft=0 or tTileLeft=64 room_goto_fixed(rLink2_EnRoad) else if tTileLeft=16 room_goto_fixed(rLink2_EnGrass) else if tTileLeft=32 room_goto_fixed(rLink2_EnDesert) else if tTileLeft=48 room_goto_fixed(rLink2_EnForest)
